title: SEALAPACK® FOOD BAGS, READY TO USE ROLL, KITCHEN ESSENTIAL, ROLL OF 200 BAGS
features: PRACTICAL & CONVENIENT: Sealapack Food Bags are safe to store fresh food, prepared sandwiches, freeze leftovers or securely marinate fish, meat or vegetables. Large 200 Bag Roll

EFFICIENT STORAGE, REDUCE FOOD WASTE: Larger packs sizes can be reduced into smaller portion sizes, place food in a bag in the fridge and the balance in bags in the freezer for use at a later date. Freezers are often under used, make the most of this large roll of bags and reduce food waste.

REDUCE WASTE: Portion fresh food of leftovers before placing in the fridge to eat before the use by date. Freeze remainder to avoid waste. Frozen foods should be defrosted in the fridge to keep it chilled. Once thawed use as soon as possible

PICNIC OR PARTY: Wrap a variety of foods safely in different bags, to efficiently pack a cool bag or picnic basket. Use the empty bags to today away the picnic waste. Easily and quickly store leftovers from a party
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: ROLL OF 200 BAGS
